expectedIssues: Responsible gaming icon is missing from the top nav bar
reportedIssues: Several horizontally arranged items are visibly cut off at the right edge, including the top category tab labeled “Hot Ga...” and multiple game cards in the game sections. This makes the page look horizontally overflowing or improperly sized for the viewport.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game grid content near the bottom of the screen, hiding parts of the lower game cards.
The “Hot Ga...” category label is truncated at the viewport edge, making the label incomplete and less readable.
The game sections show partial third-column cards on the right, which may look accidental if this is intended to be a grid rather than a carousel.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues mention a responsible gaming icon or the top nav bar; all reported issues concern horizontal overflow, truncation, and layout problems with game cards and navigation overlap.
